hero.title: Balancing Thermal Energy
hero.description: Copa Solar US Inc is an American PropTech company based in Manhattan, New York, specializing in innovative thermal solar solutions engineered for integration into the built environment. Our absorber technology transforms buildings into sustainable energy powerhouses.

floatingBadge.title: +Energy Facade
floatingBadge.subtitle: The thermal energy facade by Copa Solar US Inc

about.label: About Copa Solar US Inc
about.title: Reinventing Solar Thermal for the Built Environment
about.description1: Founded in 2022, Copa Solar US Inc is a lean PropTech Hardware company based in Manhattan, New York, that designs energy balancing products using innovative thermal solar absorbers. Our patented technology uses high-temperature adhesive developed with tesa®, enabling universal, non-penetrative mounting on any surface.
about.description2: We operate with a partner-led execution model, where engineering, sales, installation, and service are performed by specialized regional partners. This enables rapid deployment across 13+ countries with local compliance and minimal logistics overhead.

manufacturing.title: German Contract Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: High-quality absorbers manufactured in Germany with just-in-time production and delivery.

iso.title: ISO Certified
iso.description: ISO 9001 certified with ISO 14001 in progress. EPD certified for environmental transparency.

carbon.title: Carbon Neutral Production
carbon.description: 100% fossil-free energy production with approved Environmental Product Declaration.

products.label: Our Products
products.title: Products & Applications Based on the Copa Solar Absorber
products.description: All products are deployed through trained regional partners, supported remotely by Copa Solar US Inc's engineering and design team.

energyFacade.name: +Energy Facade
energyFacade.subtitle: With Cosentino & SFS
energyFacade.description: A building-integrated thermal façade system combining Copa Solar absorber, Cosentino Dekton® slabs, and SFS façade fastening systems.

energyWall.name: +Energy Wall
energyWall.subtitle: With Cosentino Group
energyWall.description: Revolutionary indoor climate control integrated into premium Dekton® architectural surfaces. Silent radiant heating and cooling with zero moving parts.

pvtPanels.name: PVT Panels
pvtPanels.subtitle: Made in Germany & Assembled in USA
pvtPanels.description: Solar panel combining photovoltaic and thermal energy production. Excess heat is led away to optimize PV efficiency while thermal energy is captured for various applications.

pvtDistrictHeating.name: PVT District Heating
pvtDistrictHeating.subtitle: GeoSolar Solutions
pvtDistrictHeating.description: Solar thermal and geosolar solutions for district heating networks, replacing fossil fuels while preserving existing infrastructure.

repvwer.name: RePvWer
repvwer.subtitle: Retrofit PV → PVT
repvwer.description: Aluminium pipe-and-plate construction that converts existing PV installations into high-performance PVT systems without structural changes.

energyTerrace.name: +Energy Terrace
energyTerrace.subtitle: With Cosentino
energyTerrace.description: A terrace-based thermal system providing summer energy harvesting for DHW and storage, and winter heating for snow melt.

upmBiopura.name: UPM BioPura Brine
upmBiopura.subtitle: General Agent for the US
upmBiopura.description: 100% wood-based, fossil-free heat transfer fluid from UPM Biochemicals. Copa Solar US Inc is the exclusive general agent for UPM BioPura glycols in the United States.

specs.spec2: Up to 90% CO₂ reduction vs fossil

benefits.label: Why Copa Solar US Inc
benefits.title: Sustainable Energy Solutions with Maximum Efficiency
benefits.description: Our state-of-the-art solar energy facade seamlessly integrates with intelligent energy management, thermal storage, and heat pumps to maximize efficiency while eliminating CO₂ emissions.

peakPower.title: 1,400 W/m² Peak Power
peakPower.description: Industry-leading thermal peak output for maximum energy harvesting from facades and surfaces.

radiativeCooling.title: 200 W/m² Radiative Cooling
radiativeCooling.description: Passive cooling capabilities reduce building cooling loads and indoor temperatures.

heatingCooling.title: Heating, Cooling & Hot Water
heatingCooling.description: Versatile system provides heating, cooling, and domestic hot water from a single installation.

silentOperation.title: Silent Operation
silentOperation.description: No moving parts means completely silent energy production with minimal maintenance.

recyclable.title: 100% Recyclable
recyclable.description: Sustainable materials that can be fully recycled at end of life, supporting circular economy.

warranty.title: 25-Year Warranty
warranty.description: Long-term performance guaranteed with comprehensive warranty coverage.

energyReduction.title: >80% Energy Reduction
energyReduction.description: Dramatically reduce energy consumption and operational costs for building owners.

producedEurope.title: Produced in Europe
producedEurope.description: German manufacturing with ISO certifications ensures highest quality standards.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Ready to Transform Your Building's Energy?
contact.description: Whether you're a property developer, HVAC partner, or facade contractor, we'd love to discuss how Copa Solar US Inc can help you deliver sustainable energy solutions to your projects.

form.name: Name

form.successMessage: Thank you for your interest. We'll get back to you shortly.

footer.description: Balancing thermal energy by reinventing solar thermal. Copa Solar US Inc delivers sustainable energy solutions for the built environment.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Copa Solar US Inc. All rights reserved.

caseStudies.label: Case Studies
caseStudies.title: Results with Copa Solar US Inc
caseStudies.description: Explore how our thermal energy solutions have delivered measurable results for property owners, district heating systems, and sustainable building projects.

epd.label: Environmental Transparency
epd.title: Environmental Product Declaration
epd.description: Third-party verified EPD in accordance with EN 15804+A2 & ISO 14025/ISO 21930, providing transparent environmental impact data for our Retrofit Thermal Absorber.
epd.circularDescription: Our thermal absorber achieves 122% secondary material output, meaning more recyclable material is produced than consumed. With 107 kWh total energy use per m² and low carbon footprint, Copa Solar US Inc products lead the industry in sustainable building solutions.
epd.certificationsDescription: Copa Solar US Inc maintains the highest standards through internationally recognized certifications.

memberships.label: Industry Networks
memberships.title: Memberships & Affiliations
memberships.description: Copa Solar US Inc is an active member of leading industry organizations driving the future of sustainable heating and cooling technology.
memberships.shcDescription: Team Sweden initiative promoting Swedish sustainable heating and cooling solutions globally through export partnerships and international collaboration.
memberships.gdhcDescription: European network advancing 5th Generation District Heating and Cooling technology with ultra-low temperatures and bidirectional energy flows.
memberships.businessSwedenDescription: Business Sweden's New York office plays a key role in Copa Solar US Inc's business modeling and market entry strategy. As Sweden's official trade and investment council, Business Sweden provides strategic advisory, market intelligence, and networking support that connects Copa Solar's Swedish innovation with North American market opportunities, accelerating commercialization and partnership development across the United States.

partners.label: Our Partners
partners.title: North American Partnerships & Full Support Model
partners.description: Copa Solar US Inc collaborates with world-class partners to deliver innovative thermal solutions across North America while maintaining the highest quality standards.

cosentino.description: Global family-owned Spanish company that manufactures and distributes innovative, sustainable surface materials including Dekton® ultra-compact surfaces.

sfs.description: Specialist for fastening solutions in the building envelope with 30+ years of experience in modern fastening systems for construction.

tesa.description: Co-developed Copa Solar's patented high-temperature double-sided adhesive tape enabling universal, non-penetrative mounting.

lawrenceLowy.description: Lawrence Lowy Associates is the leading New York/New Jersey specialist for commercial plumbing and heating solutions. With 75+ years of experience since 1956, they provide engineers and contractors with expert product knowledge, system design, and installation support for high-efficiency boilers, water heaters, heat exchangers, and heat trace solutions.

heliene.description: Leading American solar PV manufacturer with 1.3 GW capacity across Minnesota facilities, providing high-domestic-content modules for US-assembled PVT solutions meeting IRA Domestic Content requirements.

lavada.description: LAVADA, Inc. is a New York City-based contracting firm specializing in facade systems and building envelope solutions for commercial, institutional, and residential projects. Their portfolio includes landmark projects such as Delta at LaGuardia Airport, Brooklyn Health Center, and 1047 Commonwealth Ave.

brightcoreEnergy.description: Brightcore Energy delivers award-winning geothermal, solar, and energy efficiency solutions to commercial, institutional, and government clients. Their turn-key EDGE™ and UrbanGeo® geothermal offerings provide the most impactful building decarbonization solutions for large-scale applications across higher education, healthcare, Fortune 500, and government sectors.

copaSolarAb.description: Copa Solar AB is the Swedish technology headquarters, leading R&D, product development, and European manufacturing of thermal absorber technology.

becomePartner.title: Become a Copa Solar US Inc Partner
becomePartner.description: Every partner receives comprehensive support to successfully deploy Copa Solar solutions across North America.

localExpertise.title: Local Expertise
localExpertise.description: Partners bring knowledge of local building codes, HVAC environments, and construction methods.

fullSupport.title: Full Support
fullSupport.description: Engineering support, installation training, energy modeling, and sales enablement included.

rapidScaling.title: Rapid Scaling
rapidScaling.description: Partner-led model enables rapid deployment across North America with minimal overhead.

innovationAccess.title: Innovation Access
innovationAccess.description: Partners get access to Copa Solar's patented technologies and continuous product development.

globalGoals.label: Our Impact
globalGoals.title: Contributing to the UN Global Goals
globalGoals.description: Copa Solar US Inc's innovative thermal solutions directly support the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals, driving meaningful progress toward a sustainable future.
globalGoals.learnMore: Learn more about the UN Sustainable Development Goals

sdg7.name: Affordable and Clean Energy
sdg7.impact: Our solar thermal absorbers generate clean renewable heat, reducing dependency on fossil fuels and making sustainable energy accessible for buildings worldwide.

sdg8.name: Decent Work and Economic Growth
sdg8.impact: Copa Solar US Inc creates green jobs across 13+ countries through our partner network, supporting sustainable economic growth in the clean energy sector.

sdg9.name: Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure
sdg9.impact: Our patented PVT technology represents breakthrough innovation in building-integrated renewables, transforming construction industry standards.

sdg10.name: Reduced Inequalities
sdg10.impact: By enabling affordable solar thermal solutions, we help reduce energy poverty and provide equal access to clean heating and cooling globally.

sdg11.name: Sustainable Cities and Communities
sdg11.impact: Our façade-integrated systems help cities achieve net-zero targets, creating sustainable buildings and communities for future generations.

sdg12.name: Responsible Consumption and Production
sdg12.impact: Our EPD-certified products promote circular economy principles, with 35+ year lifespans and recyclable aluminum construction.

sdg17.name: Partnerships for the Goals
sdg17.impact: Through strategic partnerships with Cosentino, SFS, tesa®, and global distributors, we accelerate collective action toward climate goals.

nycCompliance.label: NYC Building Compliance
nycCompliance.title: Solutions for New York City Building Owners
nycCompliance.description: New York City has the most demanding building regulations in the United States. Copa Solar's +Energy Façade is the only solution that addresses façade safety, emissions reduction, and energy code compliance in a single integrated system.
nycCompliance.problemTitle: The NYC Building Owner's Triple Challenge
nycCompliance.problemDescription: New York City building owners face an unprecedented convergence of regulations: aging façades triggering costly LL11 repairs, aggressive LL97 emissions caps with $268/ton annual penalties, and strict ASHRAE 90.1 energy requirements for any renovation. Standard approaches address each problem separately — tripling costs and timelines. No existing solution tackles all three until now.
nycCompliance.ctaDescription: Copa Solar's +Energy Façade is the only building-integrated solution that simultaneously achieves LL11 Safe classification, closes up to 60% of the LL97 emissions gap, and meets ASHRAE 90.1-2019 building energy requirements — transforming regulatory burden into long-term asset value.

hero.title: +Energy Terrace
hero.description: Revolutionary thermal energy system that transforms outdoor terraces into sustainable energy producers. Harvest solar energy while extending your outdoor season with heated surfaces.

introduction.label: Sustainable Innovation
introduction.title: Sustainable Energy Solutions with
introduction.description: Our integrated green energy systems combine solar power, heat pumps, and geothermal storage to deliver sustainable heating, cooling, and ventilation with maximum efficiency. The +Energy Terrace is a revolutionary solution that generates thermal energy while providing heated outdoor surfaces for year-round comfort.
introduction.description2: Completely silent and capable of producing energy even without direct sunlight conditions, it ensures a continuous and optimized energy supply. This not only optimizes energy performance and sustainability but also enhances property value and supports certifications such as BREEAM, LEED and DGNB.

dualEnergy.title: Dual Energy Harvest
dualEnergy.description: Captures solar thermal energy while providing comfortable heated outdoor surfaces

extendedSeason.title: Extended Season
extendedSeason.description: Enjoy your terrace year-round with integrated heating from renewable sources

sustainable.title: 100% Sustainable
sustainable.description: Zero CO₂ emissions with fully recyclable materials and approved EPD & LCA

silent.title: Silent Operation
silent.description: No moving parts ensures completely silent energy production

applications.label: Applications
applications.title: Versatile Solutions
applications.description: Energy from +Energy Terrace may be used in geothermal applications such as heating, cooling and balancing across various property types.

residential.title: Residential
residential.description: Private terraces and outdoor living spaces

hospitality.title: Hospitality
hospitality.description: Hotels, restaurants, and outdoor dining areas

economy.label: Economy
economy.title: Cost Reduction
economy.description: Significant operational savings through reduced energy consumption and eliminated CO₂ emissions.

hotWater.title: Hot Water
hotWater.description: Reduced cost for domestic hot water

specs.label: Technical Specifications
specs.title: Performance & Facts
specs.description: Industry-leading specifications backed by Environmental Product Declaration (EPD) and Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) certifications.

thermalPower.label: Installed Thermal Peak Power
thermalPower.description: Maximum thermal output under optimal conditions

absorber.title: Solar Absorber Core
absorber.description: Stainless steel pipes bonded to the underside of each stone paver form the heart of the +Energy Terrace system. Solar radiation heats the stone surface, and this thermal energy is transferred through the pipes to your building's heat pump.

epd.label: Environmental Impact
epd.title: Environmental Product Declaration
epd.description: Our commitment to sustainability is verified through comprehensive Environmental Product Declaration (EPD) developed together with One Click LCA, providing full transparency on the environmental impact of our products.

pillar.label: Complete Energy Terrace System
pillar.title: +Energy Terrace with Adjustable Pedestals
pillar.description: A complete turnkey solution combining solar thermal absorbers with world-leading pedestal technology for public and commercial energy-generating terraces.
pillar.absorberDescription: Stainless steel pipes bonded to the underside of each stone paver capture solar energy and transfer it to your building's heating system via a glycol-water circuit.
pillar.stainlessSteelDesc: 316L grade pipes for maximum durability and corrosion resistance
pillar.thermalBondDesc: Pipes thermally bonded to stone for optimal heat transfer
pillar.heroDescription: Create perfectly level, high-traffic outdoor spaces that generate renewable thermal energy for building heating, cooling, and hot water systems.

plazas.title: Energy-Generating Plazas
plazas.description: High-traffic public spaces with hidden solar thermal collectors beneath stone pavers.

hotel.title: Hotel & Resort Terraces
hotel.description: Premium rooftop terraces generating heat for pool heating and hot water systems.

corporate.title: Corporate Energy Terraces
corporate.description: Office building terraces providing renewable energy for building heating systems.

pbSeries.title: PB Series for Energy Terraces
pbSeries.description: The most versatile pedestal range with heights from 18mm to 955mm. Creates the service void needed for solar absorber pipe routing and heat pump connections.

absorber.title: Solar Absorber Integration
absorber.description: Stainless steel absorber pipes beneath the stone surface capture solar energy and transfer heat to the building.

peakOutput.title: 1,400 W/m² Peak Output
peakOutput.description: High-performance thermal collectors deliver exceptional energy yields for heating and hot water.

adjustable.title: Adjustable Height 18-955mm
adjustable.description: PB Series pedestals offer precision height adjustment for perfectly level surfaces over sloped substrates.

slope.title: 5% Slope Correction
slope.description: Integrated slope correctors maintain level walking surfaces regardless of substrate pitch.

fireRated.title: A1 Fire-Rated Option
fireRated.description: A-PED aluminum pedestals are non-combustible, ideal for high-rise commercial buildings.

cradle.title: Cradle to Cradle Bronze
cradle.description: 100% recyclable materials contributing to LEED and BREEAM sustainability certifications.

integration.title: Complete Energy Terrace Solution
integration.description: Adjustable pedestals combined with Copa Solar absorbers create a fully integrated system for commercial energy-generating terraces.
integration.annualDesc: Energy production from each square meter of terrace surface.
integration.heightRangeDesc: Industry-leading adjustment range for any substrate condition.
integration.loadCapacityDesc: Per pedestal, designed for commercial traffic and heavy stone.
integration.lifespanDesc: Full warranty on absorber performance and pedestal durability.

caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.title: +Energy Terrace – Commercial Project
caseStudy.description: Real estate owner with low carbon footprint ambitions, reducing from 4.7 kg CO₂ eq/m² to 3.45 kg while replacing 80% of hot water from district heating with +Energy Terrace.

projectSetup.title: Project Setup
items: Copa Solar absorber combined with terrace stone (low CO₂ eq products with EPD)
Estimated annual energy production: 740 MWh thermal
Connected to district heating through 2.5 m³ accumulator tank

customerBackground.title: Customer Background
items: Target: Reduce from 4.7 kg CO₂ eq/m² (2023) to 3.45 kg (2026)
Replace 80% of hot water from district heating
